hero.name: Jatuwit Pitukdansakul (Nut)
hero.subtitle: 7 years of experience architecting robust platforms, geospatial systems, and AI solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a Senior Full Stack Developer with 7 years of experience in architecting scalable, high-performance systems and geospatial platforms. My core philosophy centers on performance optimization—notably evidenced by my track record of reducing API response times by 85% to ensure seamless user experiences.
about.paragraph2: I have deep experience in geospatial technologies with Mapbox and managing geospatial data to optimizing map loading and real-time fleet tracking.
about.paragraph3: I have contributed to developing the No-Code platform PromptX (AI-driven interface) and the Low-Code platform OneWeb
about.paragraph4: Currently, I am diving deep into Generative AI and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) to build next-generation solutions that bridge the gap between complex data and intuitive user interfaces.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Engineering showcase from GitHub — architectures and solutions I've designed and built

projects.title: Work Experience Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects from organizations (NDA — source code not disclosed)

zero.title: Lowcode Platform with Custom Layout & UI Kit (Zero)
zero.description: Lowcode platform with custom layout engine, configurable styles, and reusable UI kit—generates apps on Oneweb. Led frontend architecture and designed layout schema with validation pipeline.

locable.title: GIS Map Platform & Performance Optimization (Locable)
locable.description: No-code GIS platform built on Mapbox—custom map layers, widget builder (keystat, filter, search, report), publish as URL or npm. Cut API response time 85% (8,000ms → 1,200ms) via k6 load testing, .geojson pre-processing, and Redis caching.

promptx.title: Prompt-to-App No-Code Platform (PromptX)
promptx.description: AI-driven no-code platform where users describe projects via prompts (type, UI, theme)—then generate apps on Oneweb. Led frontend planning and mentored 2 developers.

highlights: Architected No-Code Map Platform using Mapbox with flexible geospatial management interface
Reduced API response time by 85% (8,000ms → 1,200ms) via k6 load testing and .geojson refactoring
Primary technical consultant for enterprise client (SCG) on system scalability
Mentored 2 junior developers with code reviews and technical direction
Spearheaded frontend architecture for Zero (No-code) and PromptX (AI-driven interface)
Built scalable UIs with React.js and TypeScript
Developed and maintained backend infrastructure for Godygo logistics app
Built reliable APIs for Android mobile interface
